# ACL Reconstruction Protocol

## Indications
- Complete ACL tear in active patients
- Functional instability despite rehab

## Graft Options
- Bone-patellar tendon-bone (gold standard)
- Hamstring tendon autograft
- Quadriceps tendon autograft

## Docker Container Setup for Research DB
Use Docker to run the orthopedic research database locally.
